lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jis jis bhaavai tis tis nisataarai |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, He emancipates those with whom He is pleased. ||3||
He has strung the entire creation upon His thread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਈ ਕੋਟਿ ਦੇਵ ਦਾਨਵ ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਤ੍ਰ ॥
lines.translit: kee kott dev daanav indr sir chhatr |
lines.english: Many millions are the demi-gods, demons and Indras, under their regal canopies.
Many millions abide in heated activity, slothful darkness and peaceful light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਈ ਕੋਟਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਅਰੁ ਸਾਸਤ ॥
lines.translit: kee kott bed puraan simrit ar saasat |
lines.english: Many millions are the Vedas, Puraanas, Simritees and Shaastras.
Many millions are the beings of so many descriptions.
Many millions are made long-lived.
Many millions are the pearls of the oceans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਈ ਕੋਟਿ ਗਿਰੀ ਮੇਰ ਸੁਵਰਨ ਥੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: kee kott giree mer suvaran theeve |
lines.english: Many millions of hills and mountains have been made of gold.
Many millions are the Yakhshas - the servants of the god of wealth, the Kinnars - the gods of celestial music, and the evil spirits of the Pisaach.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਈ ਕੋਟਿ ਭੂਤ ਪ੍ਰੇਤ ਸੂਕਰ ਮ੍ਰਿਗਾਚ ॥
lines.translit: kee kott bhoot pret sookar mrigaach |
lines.english: Many millions are the evil nature-spirits, ghosts, pigs and tigers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਨੇਰੈ ਸਭਹੂ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te nerai sabhahoo te door |
lines.english: He is near to all, and yet far from all;
O Nanak, He Himself remains distinct, while yet pervading all. ||4||
Many millions inhabit the nether regions.
Many millions are born, live and die.
Many millions dwell in heaven and hell.
Many millions are reincarnated, over and over again.
Many millions eat while sitting at ease.
Many millions are created wealthy.
Many millions are anxiously involved in Maya.
Many millions are exhausted by their labors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਹਾਥੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kichh prabh kai haathe |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, everything is in the Hands of God. ||5||
Many millions become Bairaagees, who renounce the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਭਾਣਾ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਰਾਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh bhaanaa teh teh raakhe |
lines.english: Wherever He wills, there He keeps us.
Many millions are searching for God.
Within their souls, they find the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam sang tin liv laagee |
lines.english: They have attached themselves to the Lord's Name.
Many millions thirst for the Blessing of God's Darshan.
Many millions pray for the Society of the Saints.
They meet with God, the Eternal.
Those with whom He Himself is pleased,
Many millions are the fields of creation and the galaxies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਸਦਾ ਧਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak te jan sadaa dhan dhan |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, are blessed, forever blessed. ||6||
They are imbued with the Love of the Supreme Lord God.
Many millions are the divine incarnations.
Many millions are the etheric skies and the solar systems.
In so many ways, He has unfolded Himself.
So many times, He has expanded His expansion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਹੋਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh te hoe prabh maeh samaat |
lines.english: From God they emanate, and into God they merge once again.
Many millions are created in various forms.
Forever and ever, He is the One, the One Universal Creator.
Many millions are the servants of the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kaa ant na jaanai koe |
lines.english: His limits are not known to anyone.
Of Himself, and by Himself, O Nanak, God exists. ||7||
Many millions know the essence of reality.
Their eyes gaze forever on the One alone.
Their souls are enlightened.
Many millions drink in the essence of the Naam.
They are absorbed in intuitive peace and pleasure.
Many millions sing the Glorious Praises of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰ ਭਏ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਜੀਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: amar bhe sad sad hee jeeveh |
lines.english: They become immortal; they live forever and ever.
Salok:
O Nanak, they are the beloveds of the Transcendent Lord God. ||8||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: apune jan kau saas saas samaare |
lines.english: He remembers His servants with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tis balihaaranai jal thal maheeal soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the One, who pervades the waters, the lands, the sky and all space. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran prabh ek hai doosar naahee koe |
lines.english: God alone is the Doer of deeds - there is no other at all.
In an instant, He creates and destroys.
The Doer, the Cause of causes, is potent to do anything.
That which pleases Him, comes to pass.
Ashtapadee:
